name: Akaunting
description: An intuitive accounting solution for small businesses and freelancers
compose:
name: slashnode-akaunting
services:
  app:
    image: akaunting/akaunting:3.1.21
    container_name: akaunting-app
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - db
    environment:
      AKAUNTING_SETUP: 'true'
      LOCALE: en-US
      DB_HOST: akaunting-db
      DB_PORT: '3306'
      DB_NAME: akaunting
      DB_USERNAME: admin
      DB_PASSWORD: akaunting_password
      DB_PREFIX: asd_
      COMPANY_NAME: My Company
      COMPANY_EMAIL: my@company.com
      ADMIN_EMAIL: umbrel@umbrel.local
      ADMIN_PASSWORD: ${secret.APP_PASSWORD}
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8773:80
  db:
    image: mariadb:11.8.2
    container_name: akaunting-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      MYSQL_DATABASE: akaunting
      MYSQL_USER: admin
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: akaunting_password
      MYSQL_RANDOM_ROOT_PASSWORD: 'yes'
    volumes:
      - db_db:/var/lib/mysql
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  db_db:
    name: slashnode-akaunting_db_db
